name: sci-songwriting-engine
description: Structured Creative Intelligence — AI Songwriting Engine

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,ML --prefix-colors magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "bash ml-service/startup.sh"

author: jaguar999paw-droid
